_doc: v11 cycle-mechanism scores. Source of truth read by both the home Macro Overview tile (src/App.jsx) and the v11 page (public/MacroTilt_Macro_Overview_Page_v11.html). The aggregate verdict is COMPUTED from these scores using the same labelFn as v11 — do not pre-compute it here. // Credit mechanism now carries provisional triggers (HY OAS 500/600bp armed/active) added 2026-04-30. Final calibration deferred to Sprint 2.

triggers.calibration_note: Provisional rule-of-thumb thresholds. Mean 426bp / peak 1090bp (COVID 2020). 500bp ≈ mean + 0.5σ; 600bp ≈ p90. Final calibration pending v11 Sprint 2 sweep across all 6 mechanisms.
